items.heading: Hampton Style Elegance in Hayfield Estate
items.description:
Step into modern sophistication with this near-new Hampton-style residence in the prestigious Hayfield Estate, Ripley. Completed in September 2024, this beautifully crafted home blends luxury, functionality, and family comfort - all ready for you to move straight in.
 
Premium Highlights
•	Architecturally designed 263m² single-level home
•	2.6m high ceilings with light-filled interiors
•	Elegant 600x600 tiled flooring in living/lounge + plush carpeted bedrooms
•	Designer bathrooms with floor-to-ceiling tiles & free-standing bathtub
•	Luxurious master suite with walk-through robe & ensuite
•	Gourmet kitchen with Fisher & Paykel appliances
•	Stunning 40mm premium stone island bench
•	Fully ducted multi-zone air conditioning
•	Still under builder's warranty for peace of mind
 
Designed for Living
•	Three living zones - open-plan family + separate lounge/office
•	Designer kitchen with soft-close cabinetry & electric cooking
•	Spacious walk-in pantry & separate laundry
•	Seamless indoor-outdoor flow to tiled alfresco entertaining
•	Fully fenced backyard - perfect for kids & pets
•	Wide side access next to the walkway
•	NBN connected for high-speed internet
 
Location & Lifestyle
•	Ripley Central State School catchment - 5 mins
•	Bremer State High School - 11 mins
•	Ipswich Grammar School - 20 mins
•	Winston Glades Shopping Centre (IGA) - 6 mins
•	Ripley Town Centre with Coles, cafes & retail - 8 mins
•	Costco Bundamba - 14 mins
•	Ipswich Hospital - 12 mins
•	RAAF Base Amberley - 18 mins (ideal for Defence families)
•	Ipswich Train Station - 16 mins | Springfield Train Station - 23 mins
•	Approx. 45 mins to Brisbane CBD
•	Flood-free location with easy access to Cunningham & Centenary Highways
 
Make It Yours
Don't miss the opportunity to secure this stunning Hampton-style home in one of South Ripley's most sought-after communities.

Contact Rahul Singh - 0450 009 291 to arrange your private inspection or join us at the next open home.

Disclaimer: Real Gold has taken all reasonable steps to ensure the accuracy of this information but accepts no liability for any errors or omissions. Buyers are encouraged to conduct their own due diligence.

items.heading: Architectural Elegance with Designer Finishes in Kalina Estate
items.description:
Step into a world of modern sophistication and timeless style with this brand-new luxury home in the prestigious Kalina Estate, Springfield. Meticulously designed with high-end finishes and custom features, this residence offers the perfect blend of elegance, comfort, and practicality for the modern family.

Property Details
•	Land Size: 400m² | Build Size: 236.8m²
•	4 Bedrooms | 2 Designer Bathrooms | 2 Living Areas | 2-Car Garage
•	2.7m high ceilings with square-set finish
•	600x600 porcelain tiles throughout
•	Ducted air-conditioning with AirTouch smart control
•	Blinds and sheer curtains throughout for style & privacy
•	Positioned in the sought-after Kalina Estate, surrounded by green parklands, schools & lifestyle amenities

Premium Inclusions & Designer Touches
•	Elegant natural stone cladding to front façade for striking street appeal
•	Down ceiling feature with LED lighting in hallway, kitchen, and master ensuite
•	Stunning chandeliers in the hallway & classy pendant lights in the kitchen
•	Premium 2340mm internal doors for grand proportions
•	High-end finishes and fixtures throughout
•	Windows strategically placed for abundant airflow and natural light

Bedrooms & Bathrooms
•	Master suite with walk-in robe with custom shelving, luxury ensuite with:
• 	Double vanity
• 	Generous frameless shower area
• 	Gold Colour Tapware
• 	LED mirror
• 	Floor-to-ceiling tiles in Bathroom
•	Main bathroom with back-to-wall freestanding bath, double mirror robes & shelving in bedrooms
•	Ceiling fans and downlights in all bedrooms

Kitchen & Entertaining Excellence
•	Gourmet kitchen featuring:
• 	40mm premium stone waterfall island bench
• 	900mm appliances + additional oven
• 	Two under-mount sinks
• 	Pull-out sink mixers
• 	Tower cabinetry with integrated microwave & oven
•	Butler's pantry with under-mount sink and full cabinetry
•	Entertaining bar area adjacent to kitchen for seamless hosting
•	Outdoor kitchen with electric cooktop & cabinetry - ideal for alfresco dining

Additional Spaces
•	Fully equipped laundry with cabinetry
•	Separate household storage room
•	Double garage with internal access

Lifestyle & Location
•	Nestled in Kalina Estate, a master-planned community with:
• 	Landscaped parks, walking trails & playgrounds
• 	Nearby quality schools and early learning centres

Minutes to
• 	Orion Springfield Central, Orion Lagoon, and Robelle Domain Parklands
• 	Springfield Central Station for quick CBD commute
• 	Major transport links and highways

This stunning home redefines luxury living with thoughtfully curated finishes and a floor plan designed for both function and style.

Contact Rahul Singh on 0450 009 291 to book your exclusive inspection and secure this one-of-a-kind masterpiece.

Disclaimer:

Any price range displayed on this website is for functionality purposes only and should not be taken as a guide to the property's value. items.heading: Luxury Modern Living in Algester
items.description:
73 Mount Moogerah Drive, Algester

Architectural Elegance | Modern Family Comfort | Prestigious Location

Experience the pinnacle of modern sophistication with this brand-new, architecturally designed double-storey residence, where luxury, lifestyle, and location are perfectly aligned. Set on an expansive 1,474m² allotment, this 298m² designer masterpiece exemplifies refined contemporary living in one of Algester's most desirable addresses.

From the moment you arrive, the home commands attention with its striking façade, premium finishes, and masterful craftsmanship. Inside, soaring 2.7-metre ceilings, wide hallways, and a thoughtfully planned layout create an ambience of space, elegance, and natural light.

Signature Features of Luxury

• Five luxuriously appointed bedrooms, including a private guest suite on the ground floor

• Three and a half designer bathrooms featuring high-end fittings and finishes

• Gourmet kitchen with stone benchtops, full butler's pantry, premium appliances, and an oversized island for effortless entertaining

• Multiple living zones and a dedicated study, designed for family versatility and comfort

• Covered alfresco terrace for refined outdoor dining and relaxation

• Hybrid timber flooring and porcelain tiles throughout, blending style with functionality

• Ducted air conditioning,  and high-quality fixtures for year-round comfort and energy efficiency

• Double garage with internal access and additional storage

• Expansive landscaped grounds designed for both elegance and family enjoyment

Master Retreat

Upstairs, the master suite offers a private sanctuary of calm and sophistication. Featuring a spacious walk-in wardrobe and a luxurious ensuite complete with a designer shower, it's a haven of relaxation and indulgence. The additional bedrooms are generously proportioned, providing comfort and privacy for the whole family.

Prestigious Location

• Nestled within a peaceful, family-friendly enclave, this residence enjoys effortless access to:

• Leading schools, including Algester State School

• Premier retail and dining at Sunnybank Hills Shoppingtown, Calamvale Central, and Sunnybank Plaza

• Convenient public transport and major arterial routes for an easy 25-minute commute to the Brisbane CBD

The Essence of Modern Luxury

This home is more than a residence - it's a statement of architectural excellence and timeless design. Every element has been meticulously crafted to deliver an unparalleled lifestyle for those who value quality, sophistication, and location.

Contact Rahul Singh - 0450 009 291 for your private inspection or attend our upcoming open home.

Disclaimer:
This property is being marketed for sale without a specified price. Any price range displayed on this website is for functionality purposes only and should not be taken as a guide to the property's value. We encourage all interested buyers who appreciate the property-or are seeking a similar home-to attend an inspection and present their best offer for the seller's consideration.

All offers must be submitted prior to the closing date.
Please note that offers will be considered on a first-in, best-offer, and best-terms basis, and the vendor reserves the right to accept an offer at any time prior to the closing date.

items.heading: Modern Elegance | Brand New Designer Home in Covella Estate, Greenbank
items.description:
A statement in contemporary design and refined living, this brand-new residence offers the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and functionality. Set on a 420m² block with a spacious 237m² build, the home showcases sophisticated finishes, generous living spaces, and a thoughtfully designed layout ideal for modern family living.
From the street, the elevated modern façade creates a striking first impression. Inside, 2.7m high ceilings and fully tiled flooring throughout enhance the sense of space while delivering a clean, elegant aesthetic.

The centrepiece of the home is the designer kitchen, beautifully crafted for both everyday living and entertaining. Featuring a 40mm stone island bench, stylish 3-dimensional cabinetry, a sleek tower with built-in oven, and a 900mm gas cooktop, the kitchen perfectly balances style and practicality. A large fixed glass window fills the space with natural light, while the walk-in pantry offers excellent storage.

The open-plan living area is enhanced by refined down-ceiling architectural features, creating a sense of depth and sophistication. A dedicated media room provides the perfect retreat for movie nights or entertainment, while a separate study offers a quiet workspace for modern lifestyles.

Both bathrooms are finished with full-height tiling, delivering a luxurious and timeless feel. The main bathroom features a freestanding bathtub, while the master ensuite includes a double vanity, creating a private and elegant retreat.

Property Highlights
• 420m² land | 237m² designer home
• Striking elevated modern façade
• 2.7m high ceilings
• Fully tiled flooring throughout
• Designer kitchen with 40mm stone island bench
• 900mm gas cooktop and tower oven
• Elegant 3-dimensional kitchen cabinetry
• Feature fixed glass kitchen window
• Spacious walk-in pantry
• Architectural down-ceiling details
• Media room for entertainment
• Separate study area
• Fully tiled bathrooms with freestanding bathtub
• Double vanity in the ensuite

Lifestyle & Location

Located within the vibrant master-planned community of Covella Estate, this home offers a lifestyle surrounded by green spaces and modern amenities.

• Close to Covella Sporting Fields
• Minutes to Greenbank Shopping Centre
• Easy access to Springfield Central and Orion Springfield Central
• Nearby schools, childcare centres, parks and walking trails
• Approx. 35 minutes to Brisbane CBD

A beautifully crafted home ready to move in, offering a lifestyle defined by modern elegance, thoughtful design, and everyday luxury.

Rahul Singh - Real Gold Team | 0450 009 291 - Arrange your inspection today.

Disclaimer:
Some images or marketing materials may include AI-generated content, virtual staging, or digital enhancements for illustrative purposes only. All information provided is believed to be accurate; however, buyers should conduct their own enquiries and inspections to verify details. Real Gold Team and Rahul Singh accept no liability for any inaccuracies.

items.heading: LUXURY ON A GRAND SCALE. CORNER BLOCK. SUNSETS THAT CAPTIVATE.
items.description:
Welcome to 20 Barham Way, Spring Mountain - a near-new 2024 residence delivering a refined blend of space, sophistication, and lifestyle excellence on a commanding 562m² corner allotment.

Spanning an impressive 239m² of internal living, this thoughtfully designed home showcases premium proportions, seamless flow, and an abundance of natural light. From the moment you arrive, a grand 2.34m high front door creates a striking first impression, setting the tone for what lies within. Inside, 2.7m high ceilings and elegant finishes enhance the sense of openness and understated luxury.

At the heart of the home, a stunning open-plan living and dining zone is anchored by a designer kitchen, complete with a 900mm freestanding cooktop, dishwasher, and a well-appointed pantry. This central space flows effortlessly outdoors, creating the perfect setting for both relaxed living and effortless entertaining. Comfort is assured year-round with Daikin ducted air conditioning featuring AirTouch controls, along with ceiling fans and ambient downlighting throughout.

SPACE, COMFORT & FUNCTIONAL DESIGN

The home offers a well-considered layout with four spacious bedrooms, two bathrooms, a separate powder room, and a double garage, delivering both comfort and functionality.

A dedicated media room provides a private retreat, while the master suite is designed for comfort and indulgence, featuring a luxurious ensuite with dual showers, including a rainfall shower, along with private sliding door access for seamless indoor-outdoor connection.

Additional features include a walk-in linen, a well-appointed laundry with overhead cabinets, and a high-clearance roller door garage with additional storage space, complemented by a sleek epoxy-coated garage floor for a polished, durable finish.

OUTDOOR LIVING, REDEFINED

Step outside to a beautifully finished decked alfresco and expansive outdoor entertaining area, perfectly designed to maximise indoor-outdoor living.

A generous backyard with a dedicated firepit retreat sets the scene for relaxed evenings and entertaining, while low-maintenance astro turf and manicured landscaping ensure the space remains pristine year-round.

The expansive yard offers ample space for a future pool or bespoke outdoor oasis, while wide side access provides the perfect solution for caravan, boat, or additional vehicle storage.

And then… the defining feature.

Enjoy uninterrupted, breathtaking sunsets - a daily spectacle that brings people together and makes every evening feel truly special.

LOCATION WITHOUT COMPROMISE

Perfectly positioned in one of Spring Mountain's most desirable pockets, everything you need is within easy reach:

• Walking distance to Spring Mountain State School
• Minutes to Springfield Central State High School
• Close to St Peters Lutheran College, The Springfield Anglican College & St Augustine's College
• Just minutes to Orion Shopping Centre, Orion Lagoon, Springfield Central Train Station, and local amenities
• Minutes to Mater Private Hospital Springfield and the new Mater Public Hospital, opening May 2026, further enhancing the area's long-term appeal
• Close to Brookwater Golf & Country Club & Brighton Homes Arena
• Surrounded by parks, nature reserves, and walking trails

A HOME THAT MAKES A STATEMENT

This is more than a home - it's a lifestyle upgrade.

A rare opportunity to secure a premium corner position, generous landholding, and a near-new luxury residence in one of South East Queensland's fastest-growing and most sought-after communities.

20 Barham Way, Spring Mountain - where luxury, lifestyle, and location align perfectly.

Inspect today. Experience it for yourself.

Rahul Singh 0450 009 291

DISCLAIMER
All information provided has been prepared with care; however, the agent, vendor, and associated parties make no representation or warranty as to the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of the information. Interested parties are advised to conduct their own independent enquiries, inspections, and due diligence. Measurements, areas, and distances are approximate and subject to change without notice.

items.heading: Pallara Prestige - Brand-New Designer Home with Architectural Brilliance
items.description:
Step into a home where architectural elegance meets modern luxury. Brand new and meticulously crafted, this stunning residence showcases refined design, premium materials, and thoughtful features throughout - delivering a lifestyle of comfort, sophistication, and effortless family living.

Set on a generous 400m² allotment in Pallara, this home has been carefully designed to maximise space, natural light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living.

Property Highlights

• Land Size: 400m² | Build Size: 225m²
• 4 Spacious Bedrooms | 2 Designer Bathrooms | 2 Living Areas | Double Garage
• Impressive 2.7m high ceilings with modern square-set finish
• Large 600 x 600 porcelain tiles throughout the main living zones
• Ducted air-conditioning with AirTouch smart control system
• Premium build surrounded by green parklands and family-friendly amenities

Designer Features & Premium Inclusions

The striking façade immediately captures attention with natural stone cladding, creating a bold architectural statement.

Inside, the home reveals luxurious finishes including:
• Elegant feature drop ceilings with LED lighting in the hallway, kitchen, and master ensuite
• Stylish pendant lighting in the kitchen
• 2340mm high internal doors adding a grand sense of scale
• Thoughtfully positioned windows allowing abundant natural light and cross ventilation
• High-end fixtures and finishes throughout

Bedrooms & Bathrooms

The luxurious master suite is designed as a private retreat, featuring a walk-in robe with custom shelving and a beautifully appointed ensuite complete with:
• Double vanity
• Large frameless shower
• Premium Tapware
• Floor-to-ceiling tiling for a sophisticated finish

The main bathroom offers a spa-inspired feel with a back-to-wall freestanding bath, while all bedrooms include mirrored robes, ceiling fans, and quality lighting.

Kitchen & Entertaining

At the heart of the home is a show-stopping gourmet kitchen, perfectly designed for both everyday living and entertaining.

Features include:
• Premium stone waterfall island bench
• 900mm appliances plus an additional oven
• Double under-mount sinks with pull-out mixers
• Tower cabinetry with integrated microwave and oven
• Spacious butler's pantry with under-mount sink and full cabinetry
• Dedicated entertaining bar area adjoining the kitchen

For those who love hosting, the home also offers an outdoor kitchen with electric cooktop and cabinetry, creating the perfect alfresco dining experience.

Additional Functional Spaces

• Fully fitted laundry with cabinetry
• Separate household storage room
• Double lock-up garage with internal access

Key Location Amenities

• 2 minutes to Pallara State School
• 7 minutes to Forest Lake State High School
• 8 minutes to St John's Anglican College
• 8 minutes to Forest Lake Shopping Centre
• 13 minutes to Richlands Railway Station
• Approximately 25-30 minutes to Brisbane CBD

This exceptional home delivers luxury, space, and location - a rare opportunity to secure a premium lifestyle in one of Brisbane's fastest-growing suburbs.

For more information or to arrange a private inspection, contact
Rahul Singh - 0450 009 291.

Disclaimer:
This property is being marketed without a specified price. Any price range shown is for website functionality only and does not represent the property's value. Buyers are encouraged to inspect the property and submit their best offer prior to the closing date. The seller reserves the right to accept an offer at any time.

All information provided is believed to be accurate; however, buyers should conduct their own enquiries and independent investigations. Images may include virtual grass for illustrative purposes only.

items.heading: MODERN FAMILY LIVING WITH SPACE, STYLE & TOP SCHOOL ACCESS
items.description:
24 Benarkin St, Forest Lake

Positioned in a peaceful, family-friendly street, this beautifully renovated home delivers the perfect balance of modern comfort, functional design, and everyday convenience. Set on a generous 550m² block, it offers a versatile layout with multiple living zones-ideal for growing families who appreciate both space and privacy.

Step inside and experience a bright, refreshed interior where contemporary finishes meet practical living. The open-plan design flows effortlessly, creating a welcoming space for entertaining or relaxing, while a separate lounge provides flexibility for family living. Outdoors, the covered entertaining area overlooks a secure backyard-perfect for kids, pets, and weekend gatherings.

Move-in ready and thoughtfully updated, this home presents an exceptional opportunity in one of Forest Lake's most sought-after pockets.

Property Highlights

• Fully renovated with modern finishes throughout
• Four generous bedrooms plus dedicated study/home office
• Master suite with ensuite and built-in robe
• Spacious open-plan living and dining area
• Separate lounge/media room for added flexibility
• Well-appointed kitchen with ample storage and bench space
• Air conditioning for year-round comfort
• Double lock-up garage with internal access
• Internal laundry
• Covered outdoor entertaining area
• Fully fenced 550m² block-ideal for families and pets

School Catchment & Education Options

Located within highly regarded local school zones:
• Forest Lake State School
• Forest Lake State High School

Well-regarded private schools close by:
• St John's Anglican College (Prep-Year 12)
• Australian International Islamic College

Location Benefits

Enjoy excellent connectivity with easy access to Richlands railway station and major transport routes including the Logan Motorway, Centenary Highway, and Ipswich Motorway, providing seamless travel to Brisbane CBD, Ipswich, and surrounding suburbs. Also conveniently close to local shopping centres, parks, schools, and public transport, making everyday living effortless.

A complete family package offering modern upgrades, generous space, and access to quality education-this is an outstanding opportunity in a high-demand location.

AUCTION: On-Site (Unless Sold Prior)
